title: ammannia auriculata var. auriculata
intro: Ammannia auriculata var. auriculata, also known as the golden dog's tail or red seed ammannia, is a plant species in the family Lythraceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Ammannia auriculata var. auriculata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
